name: Judi's Ratatouille Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 1 large Can chopped tomatoes (drained very well)
1/4 teaspoon Dried oregano, crushed with fingers
1/4 cup Italian flat leaf parsley, minced
12 Lasagne noodles cooked and drained (use imported Italian if you can)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; stir for about one minute. Add zucchini, yellow squash, mushrooms, eggplant, and cook for 5-6 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent sticking. Stir in drained tomatoes and seasonings. Add wine. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.
1. Spray an 12 x 8-inch lasagne pan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Prepare the filling: In a medium bowl, combine ricotta cheese, grated Parmesan cheese, and egg; blend well.
3. Place a thin layer of marinara sauce in the bottom of the pan.
4. Arrange six lasagne noodles on top of the sauce.
5. Layer with half the cheese mixture, half the ratatouille, and the remaining cheese mixture.
6. Cover with the remaining six noodles.
7. Add a very thin layer of marinara sauce.
8. Sprinkle with mozzarella.
9. Pour the prepared Bechamel sauce over the top.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes or until bubbly. Remove foil and let brown for about 4-5 minutes before serving, garnished with grated Parmesan cheese.
